features.name: parameterized interface definition
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with a parameter declaration using the #(parameter) syntax

features.name: virtual interface typedef with explicit parameter override
features.description: Code should include a typedef of a virtual interface where the virtual interface type uses explicit parameter value that differs from the default

features.name: parameterized interface signals using parameter width
features.description: Code should include logic signals inside a parameterized interface that use the interface parameter for their width
